falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5,500 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this key resistance level would invalidate the 'bottom' pattern assumption and suggest a bullish reversal rather than a hold phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average of the CBOE VIX crosses below 18 and stays there for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a material decrease in market volatility, contradicting the 'blowoff' score's implication of heightened uncertainty and invalidating the hold signal's cautionary stance.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut in its next policy statement
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a dramatic shift in monetary policy would directly contradict the pattern's implication of a bottoming process and invalidate the current hold signal by introducing a new bullish catalyst.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
